content:
Yah sawaal mujhse sabse zyaada poochha jaata hai: 'LIC lein ya HDFC/ICICI/Max ka plan?' 31 varshon ke anubhav mein maine donon taraf ke graahakon ko dekha hai.

## LIC ke Faayede

**1. Saarkari Guarantee**
LIC ki sthaaapna 1956 mein saarkaar ne ki thi. LIC Act ki dhara 37 ke tahat LIC ki denadariyon ko Bharat Saarkaar ki poori guarantee prapt hai.

**2. Claim Settlement Ratio**
LIC ka claim settlement ratio 2024-25 mein 98.86% tha - desh mein sabse zyaada. Iska matlab: 100 mein se 99 claim sweekaar kiye gaye.

**3. Bonus Itihaas**
LIC 60+ varshon se lagaataar bonus de rahi hai. Koi bhi private company itni purani nahi hai.

**4. Graameen Network**
Gorakhpur, Poorvanchal, Bihar, Jharkhand mein LIC ke agent aur branch sabse zyaada hain.

## Private Insurance ke Faayede

**1. Term Insurance mein Pratiyogi Premium**
HDFC Click2Protect, ICICI iProtect Smart jaisi term plans kabhi-kabhi LIC se sasti hoti hain.

**2. Health Insurance mein Behtar**
Star, Max Bupa, HDFC Ergo ka health insurance LIC ke Arogya Rakshak se behtar hai - zyaada coverage, zyaada hospital.

## Meri Salaah

**Life Insurance:** LIC ko praathamikta dein. Saarkari guarantee, bonus itihaas, aur network - teeno LIC ko behtar banaate hain.

**Health Insurance:** Star Health, HDFC Ergo, ya Max Bupa lein.

Vistrit tulna ke liye 9415313434 par Ajay sir se baat karein.
contentHi:
LIC: saarkari guarantee, 98.86% claim settlement, 60+ varsh ka bonus itihaas. Private: sasta term, behtar health.

Salaah: life ke liye LIC, health ke liye Star/HDFC Ergo.

9415313434 par call karein.
